title: Most people get pyramiding wrong… this is how mine handles it
author: Loose-Object-8913
selftext:
Been working on this gold EA for a while and this is one part I focused on a lot — pyramiding.

Most of what I see people doing is adding to losing positions, which just kills accounts over time.

This does the opposite. It only adds when the trade is already in profit and manages risk automatically as it builds.

Tried to keep it as simple and structured as possible rather than over-optimising entries.

Will do an update today on how the EA handles Trump Tweets like yesterday.

comments.author: Loose-Object-8913
comments.body: I’ve tested a few variations of this and this has been the most stable so far

comments.author: Intellect5
comments.body:
i mean, obviously add to winners. i dont see how most people get it wrong its really simple
advice

replies.author: Loose-Object-8913
replies.body:
sounds simple but execution is where most people mess it up

timing, sizing and managing stacked positions is the hard part
